description: Verify that the 'Show My Location' feature on OpenStreetMap works correctly for users in different international cities by overriding the browser's geolocation coordinates. Emulate a user in London (51.50, -0.12) and Tokyo (35.68, 139.69). For each location, use the 'Show My Location' feature on https://www.openstreetmap.org and capture the resulting map URLs. Save both URLs to a report file at /home/ga/Desktop/geo_verification_report.txt.
